An inhabitant of lakes and swamps, the '''slimy nonakara''' or '''whirling snakes''' was a species that somehow had spread to numerous [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. 

==Biology and appearance==
Their primarily herbivorous diet was supplemented with occasional fish and insects. Nonakara excreted slime that slowed down their prey. They also exchanged slime to mate: being hermaphroditic, both partners would have offspring. Aside from when mating, they were solitary.<ref name="CG" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''
